items.name: "Dynamic" Price Floor Update - CREATED BY FOOLS
items.description:
Early March 2024, the fast food restaurant "Wendy's" had a leaked "surge pricing" upcoming change. What this basically means, is when the restaurant is busy, the food would be more expensive (lunch and dinner). Upon the intense and harsh backlash they faced on the same day, Wendy's said this was a false leak and they would not be implementing this.

Roblox has had this "surge pricing" implemented for a while now, calling it dynamic price floor, and it will only get worse. YOUR HATS ARE MORE EXPENSIVE BECAUSE ROBLOX IS GREEDY AND DOES NOT CARE ABOUT THEIR CONSUMERS. This update of course also negatively affects UGC creators. More than likely, the price floor will do nothing but increase.

roblox has had this "surge pricing" implemented for a while now, calling it dynamic price floor, and it will only get worse. your hats are more expensive because roblox is greedy and does not care about their consumers. this update of course also negatively affects ugc creators. more than likely, the price floor will do nothing but increase. maxxell body heads casual cowboy food rich
